creator: kyle@ambroffkao.com
text:
Nice, thank you Alexander! I applied https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/commit/9f83eec03904b18e052fbe2c66542bd47254cf57 to a changeset that has failed to boot for me and it now succeeds. So I can confirm that this resolves the issue.

So looks like this is fixed in main as of 0d4ad64077bcddcff5a170ee97273db95b9cab55 which pulls in that patch.
